mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vendor WHERE vendor_usage = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, V.* FROM ( SELECT vendor_id AS vendorId, vendor_name AS vendorName, vendor_type AS vendorType, vendor_tel AS vendorTel, vendor_email AS vendorEmail, vendor_address AS vendorAddress, vendor_usage AS vendorUsage FROM vendor WHERE vendor_usage = 'Y' ORDER BY vendor_id DESC ) V ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{page.startRow} AND #{page.endRow}
